meta.title: CardScan — Scan Business Cards in Bulk
meta.description: Upload multiple business cards. AI extracts contacts locally in your browser. Export to Excel, CSV, vCard. Free, no signup, 100% private.

hero.title: Scan business cards in bulk.
hero.subtitle: Upload up to 20 cards — AI runs in your browser, 100% private.
hero.privacy_badge: Local Processing — No uploads, no servers

model.error: Model load failed. Check your network and refresh.

upload.hint_mobile: Tap to photograph or select images
upload.limit_reached: Free limit reached. Upgrade to scan more.
upload.format_error: Unsupported format. Use JPG or PNG.
upload.size_error: Image too small (< 200px). Recognition may be poor.

error.title: Error — CardScan
error.default_message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.
